hero.title: EU/HU - NewDawn Modded
hero.description: A brutal, community-driven survival experience. Scavenge, build, and outlive the horde in a meticulously crafted world.

serverInfo.title: Server Overview
serverInfo.additionalNotesValue: In-game voice chat is highly encouraged. Factions can claim safehouses after 7 days of playtime, after death respawning is allowed there too. Reading speeds are increased by 4x to respect your time.

howToJoin.title: How to Join
howToJoin.step1Description: Start the game and open the 'Join' menu from the main screen.
howToJoin.step2Description: Click 'Add Server' and enter the IP address and port shown below. You can name it anything you like.
howToJoin.step3Description: Join the server. Required mods will download automatically on first connection.
howToJoin.step4Description: Set up your character, choose your spawn, and enter the world.
howToJoin.step5Description: Stay quiet, stay fed, and try not to get bitten.

rules.title: Server Rules
rules.rule1Title: 1. Respect other players outside of gameplay
rules.rule1Content: Trash talk in character is fine, but hate speech, real-life harassment, or extreme toxicity in global chat or Discord will result in an immediate ban.
rules.rule2Content: The use of third-party software, duping items, or exploiting map glitches is strictly prohibited. Report exploits if you find them.
rules.rule3Content: You may claim a safehouse after 7 days of survival time. Glitching into safehouses or destroying safehouse walls through exploits is forbidden. Normal raiding mechanics apply.
rules.rule4Content: Disconnecting while in active PvP combat or while being actively pursued by zombies to avoid death is not allowed. Your character remains in the world briefly after disconnect.
rules.rule5Content: If an admin makes a ruling on a dispute, respect it. If you believe an admin is acting unfairly, submit a ticket quietly rather than causing drama in global chat.

feedback.title: Survivor Logs
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Let us know what's on your mind...
